reviews.comment:
Cargue nafta y nunca pusieron la tapa del tanque, fui hacer el reclamo y se lavaron las manos le dije que se tenian que hacer cargo ya que solo cargo en ypf por la aplicación, todavia sigo esperando una respuesta, unos sin vergüenza. Les aconsejo que vayan a otra estacion.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with gas and they never put the tank cap back on. I went to complain and they washed their hands of it. I told them they had to take responsibility since I only fill up at YPF through the app. I'm still waiting for a response. They're shameless. I advise you to go to another station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5bkx2M3BRRRAB

reviews.comment:
No hacen la promo cuenta DNI y tiraron a un pobre perro viejo que no molestaba para nada y vivía en un rinconcito al medio del campo! No voy más! Era la estación que cargaba siempre, porque me queda cómodo el sistema para inflar las ruedas y hayy muchos playeros pero basta!! Estaciones hay miles

(Translated by Google)
They don't offer the DNI account promotion and they threw away a poor old dog who wasn't a nuisance at all and lived in a little corner in the middle of the countryside! I'm not going back! It was the station I always used to fill up, because the system for inflating my tires is convenient for me and there are lots of beach bums, but enough! There are thousands of stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5ak92eDBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Quisieron hacer desaparecer a un perrito comunitario que paraba ahí a dormir (Lobito). Por suerte, después de 12 días lo encontraron en Acantilados gracias a todos los que nos involucramos y ayudamos a que se haga viral. Son un desastre! Todo vuelve, y el escrache social es enorme. Soretes hdp  🤬🤬🤬

(Translated by Google)
They tried to get rid of a community dog ​​that used to sleep there (Lobito). Luckily, after 12 days, he was found in Acantilados thanks to everyone who got involved and helped make it go viral. They're a disaster! What goes around comes around, and the social backlash is huge. Those bastards! 🤬🤬🤬
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5akluYmp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Esta calificación va por Lobito, que no lo puede hacer.
Lobito
fué levantado de Colón y Santa Fe .
ACA Mar del Plata

El día 15 de febrero feriado
con gran temporal en la ciudad !

Se encontró a 3 km del Marquesado para adentro!

Lo tiraron en él medio del campo,
en medio de la nada
para qué le sea imposible retornar !

Hasta qué Dios lo bendijo y encontró la única casa en la zona!
Para entrar y salir del lugar tuvieron que ser acompañados por la señora que cuidó a Lobo!
Gracias a Dios y a toda la buena energía.
NO MÁS MALTRATO ANIMAL !

(Translated by Google)
This rating is for Lobito, who can't do it.

Lobito
was picked up at the corner of Colón and Santa Fe streets.

Here in Mar del Plata

On February 15th, a holiday,
with a huge storm in the city!

He was found 3 km inland from El Marquesado!

They dumped him in the middle of nowhere,
in the middle of nowhere,
so he couldn't get back!

Until God blessed him and he found the only house in the area!
To go in and out of the house, they had to be accompanied by the woman who took care of Lobito!

Thank God and all the good vibes.
NO MORE ANIMAL ABUSE!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5ak96SDhBRRAB
